\tzpentry{ID5712}{Permittivity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5712 introduces Permittivity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \epsilon = \frac{M_\text{Moon}}{M_\oplus}\left(\frac{R_\oplus}{d_\text{Moon}}\right)^3(1 + k_2) \approx 7.27 \times 10^{-8} \end{equation}
